privileged_info_summary: All three target employees (Anita Oliver, Toni Jimenez, Jeffrey Kelly) are verified as real employees from Odoo's official demo dataset bundled with the HR module. The expected credential values are verified: Anita Oliver (Badge: AO-9001, PIN: 1234), Toni Jimenez (Badge: TJ-9002, PIN: 5678), and Jeffrey Kelly (Badge: JK-9003, PIN: 9090). These credential values are defined by the task specification and do not exist in the initial Odoo demo database; they must be set by the agent during task execution. The verifier checks that these exact values are written to the Odoo database's barcode and pin fields, with timestamp validation to ensure modifications occurred during the task session.
